title: Extract Product Proof transport primitives

decisions.label: Mock self-test only covers happy-path RPC; rejection paths uncovered
decisions.rationale: Added mocked JSON-RPC error and request-timeout assertions to the AppServerClient self-test coverage.

validationAfterReviewFixes: node tools/computer-use-e2e/run-remote-cua.mjs render-unavailable --note 'transport smoke after review fixes' --run-dir /tmp/nixmac-transport-unavailable-smoke
